calendar.matters:
AMENDED ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Jan-06-2004 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for OSC hearing for Change of Name.
Commissioner Sue Kaplan, Clerks: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Noreen Ikeuye.
Petitioner Mr. Thomas (no first name) present in pro per, was sworn and examined.
The Court grants the petition CONDITIONALLY for change of name to: Alzuma Alladin and further order the Petitioner to comply with CA. Code of Civil Procedure (ccp) 1279.5(d), by close of business on Jan. 13, 2004 by providing notice of this order to the Chief of Police (San Francisco Police Dept). Matter is continued to Jan. 20, 2004 at 09:00 a.m. for Petitioner to return to Court to show that SFPD's Chief was served with NOTICE.
Decree signed in open court.

Jan. 20, 2004 in Dept. 218, Comm. S. Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Janet Pond.
Mr. Alzuma Alladin apppeared with proof of compliance with CCP 1279.5 (d).
The ORDER is complete.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Oct-30-2003 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for hearing this day.
Commissioner Sue Kaplan, Clerks: S. Ravinantapricha/V.Mack, CSR: Lavon Granger.
There being no appearances, this matter is ordered off calendar.
